title: pagaea pumila
intro: Pagaea pumila, also known as Dwarf Pagoda, is a flowering plant species within the family Thymelaeaceae. This shrub has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, helping to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits associated with Pagaea pumila include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
